message:
fix(live): only force visibility on final render for interactive terminals

Previously, the stop() method unconditionally set vertical overflow to
Visible for the final render. This caused issues in non-interactive
(dumb) terminals where the original overflow setting should be preserved.

Now checks is_interactive() before overriding the overflow behavior,
ensuring that pipe-to-file and non-TTY scenarios maintain their
configured overflow handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
